name: Raindrops QMK
description: Klasyczny efekt kropel deszczu z QMK (losowe kolory na losowych klawiszach).
code:
speed = params.get('speed', 0.05)
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
color = params.get('color', [255, 255, 255])
rainbow = params.get('rainbow', True)
for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384:
        continue
    # Losowa faza per klawisz
    random.seed(virtual_id)
    phase = random.random()
    # Czas błysku
    val = (t * speed * 2.0 + phase) % 1.0
    if val < 0.2:
        b = (1.0 - val / 0.2) * brightness
    else:
        b = 0
    if rainbow:
        hue = random.random()
        r, g, b_final = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(hue, 1.0, b)
    else:
        r, g, b_final = color[0]/255.0*b, color[1]/255.0*b, color[2]/255.0*b
    matrix[base] = int(r * 255)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g * 255)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b_final * 255)
